wrong_phrase: As-salamu alaykum, mujhe gosht chahiye. 0
correct_phrase: Namaste, mujhe meat chahiye.
rule: Over-indexing on Urdu vocabulary for generic Hindi context.

wrong_phrase: Bhaiyya, ek pindi chana bhaji pav dena. 1
correct_phrase: Bhaiyya, ek pav bhaji dena.
rule: Mixing regional terms confusingly; pav bhaji is standard.

wrong_phrase: Woh ladka bilkul machcha jaisa lagta hai. 2
correct_phrase: Woh ladka bahut sahi lagta hai.
rule: 'machcha' is South Indian/Dakhni slang.

wrong_phrase: Zindagi tension nahi leni chahi dasta. 3
correct_phrase: Zindagi tension nahi leni chahiye dosto.
rule: dasta is dialetal mispronunciation for dosto.

wrong_phrase: Estou fixando bué legal neste carro. 0
correct_phrase: Estou achando muito legal esse carro.
rule: Mixing European PT 'bué' or 'fixe' with Brazilian PT 'legal'.

wrong_phrase: Meu, pega o comboio para a praia. 1
correct_phrase: Cara, pega o trem pra praia.
rule: Comboio is EU PT, Trem is BR PT.

wrong_phrase: O gajo estava falando muita asneira. 2
correct_phrase: O cara tava falando muita besteira.
rule: Gajo is EU slang, cara is BR slang.

wrong_phrase: Vou ao talho comprar carne. 3
correct_phrase: Vou no açougue comprar carne.
rule: Talho is EU PT, Açougue is BR PT.

wrong_phrase: Oye tú, ¿qué pasa güey? 0
correct_phrase: Che vos, ¿qué pasa?
rule: güey is Mexican slang, not Argentine.

wrong_phrase: Esa fiesta estuvo muy bacana. 1
correct_phrase: Esa fiesta estuvo re piola.
rule: bacana is Colombian/Caribbean, piola is Argentine.

wrong_phrase: ¡Qué guay está este carro! 2
correct_phrase: ¡Qué bueno está este auto!
rule: guay is Spain, carro is Caribbean/Mexican, auto is Argentine.

wrong_phrase: Tranquilo mano, todo va a salir bien. 3
correct_phrase: Tranquilo chabón, todo va a salir bien.
rule: mano is Caribbean/Portuñol, chabón is Argentine.
